title: COMFEE' 30L/DAY Dehumidifier for Home, Low Noise Level, Continuous Drainage with Drain Hose, Smart App Control, Side-Access Water Tank, Ideal for Bedroom, Bathroom, Laundry, Attic, Basement, Office
features: [30L PER DAY] COMFEE' dehumidifier removing up to 30L of water per day, allowing you to adjust humidity levels from 35% to 85%. Perfect for use in 58-73m² rooms, such as homes, offices, basements, and other very humid areas.

[CONTINUOUS DRAINAGE] The 30L dehumidifier features a side-access water tank, which helps reduce spillage when manually emptying it. It also includes a drain hose, which can be plugged in to constantly drain the water collected and remove the need to manually empty the tank.
[WIRELESS CONNECTION] This dehumidifier works with Alexa and supports app control for both iOS and Android, so that you can control the dehumidifier with your smartphone anytime and from anywhere.

[ENERGY EFFICIENCY] This ERP energy efficiency-certified device allows strong dehumidification at limited electricity cost, and uses the R290 natural refrigerant. It is equipped with a washable filter that helps filter out dust and unpleasant odors.

[UNIQUE DESIGN] This room dehumidifier is designed with a sleek look to fit the style of any home, apartment, or office. Moreover, it features 360° rotatable wheels, a unique side-access water tank with a splash guard lid, and handles that offer great mobility.
